notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ty France GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.
